=== 276362 ===
### 276362 | res=2026-03-07 | string (location)
Q: What Beirut coastal district will Lebanese health officials identify as the site of an Israeli air raid on a hotel room by March 8, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-02-24. Regional fighting involving Israel, Iran, and armed groups in Lebanon is intensifying, and new strikes may hit additional parts of Beirut, including crowded civilian areas with hotels.
RC: Source of Truth : This question resolves based on official statements from Lebanon's Health Ministry or other Lebanese authorities, as confirmed by consistent contemporaneous reporting from major news outlets on or before March 8, 2026. Resolution Date : The question resolves on the date the location of the hotel-room strike is publicly identified, no later than March 8, 2026. Accepted Answer Format : The answer must be the English name of the Beirut district or locality where the hotel room was reported hit. A short place name is expected.
  PRED: {'Ramlet al-Baida': 0.12, 'Ain el-Mreisseh': 0.1, 'Jnah': 0.1, 'Manara': 0.08, 'Raouche': 0.06}
=== 338215 ===
### 338215 | res=2026-03-07 | string (institution)
Q: What embassy in Oslo will Norwegian police say was targeted in a bombing by March 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Diplomatic missions in European capitals face changing security risks during periods of international tension. Norwegian authorities monitor threats against foreign embassies in Oslo.
RC: Source of Truth : This question resolves based on a public statement from Norwegian police or another official Norwegian authority, or on clearly attributed reporting from a major wire service such as AP or Reuters, identifying the diplomatic mission that was targeted. Resolution Date : The question resolves on the first date, no later than 31 March 2026, when the targeted embassy is clearly named in official or clearly attributed reporting. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the short English name of the embassy, in 1-3 words, matching the official or widely used public description of the mission.
  PRED: {'Israeli embassy': 0.33, 'United States embassy': 0.14, 'Russian embassy': 0.1, 'Ukrainian embassy': 0.06}
=== 830793 ===
### 830793 | res=2026-03-07 | string (country name)
Q: Which country's embassy will Norwegian police say may have been deliberately targeted in a blast in Oslo by March 8, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-02-28. Diplomatic buildings can become targets during periods of international tension. This question asks which foreign state may be identified by Norwegian authorities as the apparent target if a blast is reported at an embassy compound in Oslo during the coming week.
RC: Source of Truth : Official statements from Oslo police or Norway's government, or clearly attributed reporting from a major international news outlet published by March 8, 2026, describing the embassy blast in Oslo. Resolution Date : This question resolves on the first date by March 8, 2026 when the involved embassy or intended target is explicitly identified in the source material. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the country name only, in English, as a short text answer. Do not give the city, embassy title, or a longer description.
  PRED: {'Israel': 0.34, 'United States': 0.14, 'Russia': 0.1, 'Ukraine': 0.06}
=== 578870 ===
### 578870 | res=2026-03-07 | string (location)
Q: Which Beirut district will an Israeli strike on an apartment that kills at least four people hit by March 8, 2026?
BG: Question Start Date: 2026-03-01. Military tensions involving Israel, Lebanon, and Iran-linked actors remain high. If a strike occurs in Beirut, later reporting may identify the district where the hit apartment is located.
RC: Source of Truth : This question will resolve based on Reuters reporting published on or by March 8, 2026 about the relevant Israeli strike in Beirut. If Reuters issues a correction or clarification, the corrected Reuters version will control. Lebanese official statements may be used only to confirm the district name if needed. Resolution Date : The question resolves on March 8, 2026, once the district of the struck apartment is clearly identified in reporting. Accepted Answer Format : Provide the single district name only, exactly as reported in English. Do not include the city or country.
  PRED: {'Haret Hreik': 0.18, 'Ghobeiri': 0.12, 'Burj el-Barajneh': 0.12, 'Dahieh': 0.1, 'Chiyah': 0.06}

Tehran police stations bombed, massive death toll expected

Police stations, intelligence-related centers and paramilitary bases all around Tehran have been heavily bombarded, CBS News confirms. Mugo Odigwe reports.

HEADLINE: Victoria Memorial Bomb Scare:শহরে মমতার হাইভোল্টেজ কর্মসূচির মাঝে ভিক্টোরিয়ায় বোমাতঙ্ক! তৎপর পুলিশ
SOURCE: www.hindustantimes.com
PUBLISHED: 2026-03-06 00:00:00 | DOWNLOADED: 2026-03-06 00:00:00
URL: https://www.hindustantimes.com/bangla/bengal/bomb-scare-in-victoria-memorial-hall-in-kolkata-police-initates-investigation-bomb-suqad-reached-271772798775440.html

Victoria Memorial Bomb Scare:শহরে মমতার হাইভোল্টেজ কর্মসূচির মাঝে ভিক্টোরিয়ায় বোমাতঙ্ক! তৎপর পুলিশ

জানা গিয়েছে, এক ইমেল মারফৎ বার্তায় বিস্ফোরণের হুমকি দিয়ে ভিক্টোরিয়া মেমোরিয়ালের কর্তৃপক্ষের কাছে হুমকি বার্তা পাঠানো হয়েছে। ইতিমধ্যেই ঘটনা ঘিরে তৎপরতা শুরু করেছে পুলিশ। পৌঁছে গিয়েছে বম্ব স্কোয়াড। জানা গিয়েছে, বোমা হুমকির খবর পেতেই হেস্টিংস থানার বিশাল পুলিশ বাহিনী পৌঁছে যায় ভিক্টোরিয়া মেমোরিয়াল হল-এর চত্বরে। সেখানে বম্ব ও ডগ স্কোয়াড নিয়ে পৌঁছেছে পুলিশ।
এদিকে, ধর্মতলা মেট্রো চ্যানেলে ধরনায় বসেছেন মমতা বন্দ্যোপাধ্যায়। আর সেখান থেকে ভিক্টোরিয়ার দূরত্ব ৩ কিলোমিটার। মঞ্চে মমতা ছাড়াও একাধিক তাবড় ব্যক্তিত্বরা রয়েছে। ফলত, কলকাতা শহর জুড়ে নিরাপত্তা এই মুহূর্তে বড় বিষয়।
প্রতিদিনই প্রায় বিপুল সংখ্যক মানুষ, এই ভিক্টোরিয়া মেমোরিয়ালে ঘুরতে আসেন। গোটা রাজ্য থেকে যেমন মানুষ বেড়াতে আসেন, তেমনই রাজ্যের বাইরের মানুষও সেখানে বেড়াতে আসেন। তেমনই এক জায়গায় এমন বোমাতঙ্কের ঘটনা শহরের নিরাপত্তার দিক থেকে বেশ তাৎপর্যপূর্ণ।
এর আগে, দিল্লির বিভিন্ন স্কুলে বোমাতঙ্কের ঘটনা ঘটে। হেড পোস্ট অফিস গুলিতেও বোমা হামলার হুমকি চিঠি আসে। সদ্য গোপালনগর থেকে বোমাতঙ্ক ছড়ানোর অভিযোগো সৌরভ বিশ্বাস নামেও একজনকে গুজরাট পুলিশ গ্রেফতার করে। আপাতত ভিক্টোরিয়ার ঘটনার তদন্ত কোনদিকে যায় সেদিকে তাকিয়ে রাজ্য।

HEADLINE: Trump Tower suspicious package: What happened in Manhattan as NYPD clears threat? All we know
SOURCE: www.hindustantimes.com
PUBLISHED: 2026-03-03 00:00:00 | DOWNLOADED: 2026-03-03 00:00:00
URL: https://www.hindustantimes.com/world-news/us-news/trump-tower-suspicious-package-what-happened-in-manhattan-as-nypd-clears-threat-all-we-know-101772504973904.html

Trump Tower suspicious package: What happened in Manhattan as NYPD clears threat? All we know

A suspicious package discovered Monday afternoon, per local time, inside Trump Tower prompted a response from the NYPD bomb squad and the US Secret Service, briefly disrupting traffic in Midtown Manhattan. Authorities later determined the package was not a threat, and no evacuations or injuries were reported. According to police, a 911 call was received around 4:20 pm ET after the Secret Service located the package in the building’s mailroom at 725 Fifth Avenue. The NYPD confirmed to Newsweek that bomb technicians were dispatched to investigate and secure the area. Also Read: ‘Bombs will be dropping everywhere tonight’: 5 big remarks by Donald Trump after Israel, US strike Iran
By shortly before 6 pm, NBC New York reported that the package had been cleared. Heavy police presence in Midtown
Videos circulating on social media showed multiple police vehicles, fire trucks and tactical officers stationed outside the Fifth Avenue skyscraper. Despite the visible law enforcement activity, officials said there were no arrests linked to the incident. Security concerns amid heightened alert
The incident unfolded as US law enforcement agencies remain on heightened alert amid ongoing geopolitical tensions tied to military operations involving Iran. However, officials have not indicated any connection between the suspicious package and broader national security concerns. Anti-war demonstrators were reported outside the tower Monday evening, though authorities have not established any link between the protest activity and the package. Also Read: Where has Iran targeted? All on retaliatory strikes amid vow to ‘deliver a historic lesson’ to Israel and US
Trump Tower, a 58-story mixed-use building that houses the headquarters of the Trump Organization and residences, has long drawn security due to its association with President Donald Trump. Officials have not released additional details about the package as of publication.

HEADLINE: NYPD on alert for retaliation after strikes in Iran
SOURCE: www.cbsnews.com
PUBLISHED: 2026-02-28 00:00:00 | DOWNLOADED: 2026-03-01 00:00:00
URL: https://www.cbsnews.com/newyork/video/nypd-on-alert-for-retaliation-after-strikes-in-iran/

NYPD on alert for retaliation after strikes in Iran

Cities across the country, including here in New York, are stepping up security in light of the attacks in Iran. The NYPD is on alert for retaliation, increasing patrols at religious and cultural sites across the city. CBS News New York's Naveen Dhaliwal reports.

═══ [5] ═══════════════════════════════════════
HEADLINE: Tamil Nadu: Passport office gets hoax bomb threat mail in Coimbatore
SOURCE: www.hindustantimes.com
PUBLISHED: 2026-03-02 00:00:00 | DOWNLOADED: 2026-03-02 00:00:00
URL: https://www.hindustantimes.com/india-news/tamil-nadu-passport-office-gets-hoax-bomb-threat-mail-in-coimbatore-101772450565190.html

Tamil Nadu: Passport office gets hoax bomb threat mail in Coimbatore

A bomb threat email sent to the Passport Office in the Chitra area of Coimbatore on Tuesday triggered heightened security measures, the official said. Following the alert, personnel from the Bomb Detection and Disposal Squad (BDDS) rushed to the office and conducted thorough checks of the premises to ensure safety. Police officials have launched an investigation into the threat and are probing the source and authenticity of the email. ALSO READ | Now, bomb threats sent to 18 private schools in Mohali
More details awaited. Earlier today in Delhi, Axis Bank at the Statesman House Building at Connaught Place received a bomb threat via email, with police arriving at the spot swiftly for a search. Police personnel and dog squad teams are currently present at the spot and are conducting a thorough search. ALSO READ | Security tightened in Jalandhar after schools receive threat emails ahead of PM’s visit
One of the employees in the building spoke to ANI, stressing how such threats trigger widespread panic among the people, stating, "We were doing our work just like on normal days. Suddenly, there is a call that a bomb threat has been made. So, that creates a panic situation for us. When we came out of the building, we saw that there was a bit of a panic situation. There was a police car. The fire brigade and the dog squad had also come there."
ALSO READ | Patiala schoolboy ends life; was intimidated by cops, says family
"So, it was such a situation that, of course, creates a panic condition for all of us...Because after leaving home, this is the only place where we feel safe. If such threats are coming there, then of course it is a matter of fear," he added. Earlier, four schools in the national capital also received bomb threat emails in the morning, triggering panic among parents and authorities.
"}

═══ [1] ═══════════════════════════════════════
HEADLINE: Israeli forces bomb hotel in Beirut, residential building in Lebanon’s east
SOURCE: www.aljazeera.com
PUBLISHED: 2026-03-04 00:00:00 | DOWNLOADED: 2026-03-04 00:00:00
URL: https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2026/3/4/israeli-forces-bomb-hotel-in-beirut-residential-building-in-lebanons-east?traffic_source=rss

Israeli forces bomb hotel in Beirut, residential building in Lebanon’s east

Israeli strikes have hit a hotel in the Lebanese capital and a residential complex in Lebanon’s east, as the military issued more forced displacement orders for Beirut and towns across the country under heavy fire. Israeli forces bombed the Comfort Hotel on the border of Hazmieh and Baabda, which are part of greater Beirut, Lebanese state media said Wednesday. Recommended Stories
list of 3 items
list 1 of 3Israel launches strikes on Beirut as troops advance into southern Lebanon
list 2 of 3Lebanon’s ban on Hezbollah ‘activities’: bold but difficult to implement
list 3 of 3School turned into shelter for families displaced in southern Lebanon
end of list
Footage verified by Al Jazeera showed a building with blown-out windows and walls, and debris strewn everywhere. Al Jazeera’s Heidi Pett, reporting from Beirut, said the attack happened without any warning, indicating that this could have been an attempted assassination. “The Israeli military is yet to say exactly who or what it was attempting to target,” Pett said. There have been further attacks on Beirut’s southern suburbs on Wednesday. Israel says it’s targeting Hezbollah in the densely populated civilian area. The Israeli military said it is carrying out more attacks on what it called Hezbollah “infrastructure in Beirut”. More than 40 people have now been killed in Lebanon in Israeli attacks since this front of the war ignited. Lebanese army officials told Al Jazeera that at least four people were wounded, including one in critical condition. Meanwhile, the Israeli military’s Arabic-language spokesperson issued new forced displacement orders for residents of the Haret Hreik neighbourhood in Beirut’s southern suburbs. The spokesperson released a map of the Lebanese capital with buildings marked in red and warned that people should flee the site, claiming it was “affiliated with Hezbollah”. The Israeli military also issued an “urgent warning”, calling on people to leave 16 towns in southern Lebanon.

═══ [5] ═══════════════════════════════════════
HEADLINE: At least four killed in Israeli strike on building in Lebanon’s Baalbek
SOURCE: www.straitstimes.com
PUBLISHED: 2026-03-04 00:00:00 | DOWNLOADED: 2026-03-04 00:00:00
URL: https://www.straitstimes.com/world/middle-east/at-least-four-killed-in-israeli-strike-on-building-in-lebanons-baalbek

At least four killed in Israeli strike on building in Lebanon’s Baalbek

An Israeli strike on a four-storey residential building has killed at least four people and wounded six others in the eastern Lebanese city of Baalbek with rescue teams working to pull families from beneath the rubble, state news agency NNA said on March 4 . The strike was part of a sharp escalation in fighting along the Lebanese-Israeli border since March 2 after Hezbollah fired drones and missiles at Israel. Since then, the Iran-aligned group has launched further rockets and Israel has carried out waves of air strikes across Lebanon and sent troops into the south. Shi’ite Muslim Hezbollah, established by Iran’s Revolutionary Guards in 1982, opened fire on Israel to avenge the killing of Iran’s supreme leader in joint strikes by Israel and the US. Hezbollah said on March 4 that its fighters fired a salvo of rockets at a gathering of Israeli forces near the Metula area along the frontier in response to Israeli strikes on dozens of Lebanese towns and cities, including Beirut’s southern suburbs. The Israeli military on March 4 warned residents of 16 villages in Lebanon to evacuate, saying Hezbollah activity was forcing it to act against the group and cautioning that anyone near Hezbollah fighters, facilities or weapons would be putting their lives at risk. NNA also reported several Israeli strikes early on March 4 , including one on a hotel and another on an apartment in eastern Lebanon. Lebanon’s Health Ministry said on March 3 that Israeli strikes had killed at least 50 people and wounded 335 since the latest escalation began. REUTERS
"}
